mission.title: Install and Configure Argo on Kubernetes
mission.description: Argo CD is a declarative, GitOps continuous delivery tool for Kubernetes, allowing you to manage application definitions, configurations, and environments in a version-controlled manner. Installing Argo CD enables automated deployment and lifecycle management of your applications.

steps.title: Add the Argo CD Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the official Argo CD Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration with the following command:
```bash
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Argo CD using Helm
steps.description:
Install Argo CD in a new namespace called 'argocd' using the following command:
```bash
helm install argocd argo/argo-cd --version v3.3.2 --namespace argocd --create-namespace
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check that all Argo CD pods are running by executing:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argocd
```

steps.title: Access the Argo CD API Server
steps.description:
To access the Argo CD API server, you can port-forward the service:
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server -n argocd 8080:443
```

steps.title: Set resource limits for Argo CD
steps.description:
To set resource limits for Argo CD, edit the deployment:
```bash
kubectl edit deployment argocd-server -n argocd
```
Add the following under 'spec.template.spec.containers.resources':
```yaml
resources:
  limits:
    cpu: 500m
    memory: 512Mi
  requests:
    cpu: 250m
    memory: 256Mi
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Argo CD will show all pods in the 'argocd' namespace as running. You can access the Argo CD UI at http://localhost:8080 after port-forwarding the service.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
helm install argocd argo/argo-cd --version v3.3.2 --namespace argocd --create-namespace

prerequisites.description: You need a Kubernetes cluster and the Helm and kubectl command-line tools installed.
